name: SST (Serverless Stack Toolkit v3 / Ion)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); SST / Dax Raad; you pay AWS/Cloudflare costs

auth.notes: Uses AWS credentials from local env/IAM roles

performance.notes: IaC tool; deploy-time only; runtime performance is cloud-dependent

agent_readiness.notes: TypeScript IaC for AWS and Cloudflare, built on Pulumi. sst.config.ts defines infrastructure. Components: Function (Lambda), Api (API Gateway), Bucket (S3), Queue (SQS), Topic (SNS), Cluster (ECS), StaticSite, NextjsSite, RemixSite, SvelteKitSite. Live Lambda dev (sst dev) streams logs real-time. Link pattern: Function.bind([bucket]) gives Lambda access to resource. TypeScript-first. v3 (Ion) uses Pulumi under the hood, replacing CDK. Console for monitoring deploys. Better DX than raw CDK.

gotchas: v3 (Ion) is major breaking change from v2 (CDK-based)
Still maturing — some edge cases in v3
best_when: TypeScript full-stack apps deploying to AWS Lambda
Teams wanting DX-first alternative to raw CDK or Terraform
Next.js/Remix/SvelteKit apps needing serverless AWS deployment
Live Lambda development with hot reload
avoid_when: Need stable v2 features (v3 is breaking)
Teams already invested in AWS CDK or Terraform
summary: SST (Ion v3) is a TypeScript IaC tool for AWS built on Pulumi. Define Lambda functions, S3, SQS, API Gateway, and full-stack sites in sst.config.ts. Link pattern gives Lambda type-safe access to resources. Live Lambda dev with log streaming. Next.js/Remix/SvelteKit deployment out of box. Better DX than raw CDK. v3 is a complete rewrite — teams on v2 face migration. Best for TypeScript-first AWS serverless applications.
